categories.description: Admin-facing. Sent to tenant admins + marketing role when a coupon's usage_count hits its usage_cap. Includes recent-redemption rollup + suggested action (top up cap / launch a follow-up campaign / accept the campaign closed).

Admin-facing. Sent to tenant admins + marketing role when a coupon reaches its valid_until timestamp. Also fires at 14/7/1 day windows before expiry for coupons with usage_count > 0 (informational warning — not a terminal event).
Admin-facing REAL-TIME redemption stream. Opt-in — most tenants don't need per-redemption pings. Useful for high-value / limited campaigns where admins want live visibility.

Sent to the redemption customer + tenant admin when a redemption is reversed (refund / chargeback / fraud / manual admin). Cannot-opt-out — the customer needs to know their applied discount was reversed. Includes clawback_reason + next-step guidance (support contact for disputes).
